name: cities-skylines-heightmap-generator
description: *This is a fork of the original heightmap builder (JBerg60/cities-heightmap)*

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['index.html','styles.css','favicon.ico','jszip.js','pako.min.js','upng.js'];for (const f of files){fs.copyFileSync('src/'+f,'out/'+f);}"
